headline: BlackRock Retains Top Spot in the U.S. 2026 Broadridge Fund Brand 50 Report
summary: The latest edition of Broadridge's Fund Brand 50 (FB50), an annual research study by global Fintech leader Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:BR), was released today, highlighting the world's best-performing third-party asset management brands. BlackRock retains first place for a second successive year; however its lead was cut and this year saw the further ascendance of relatively recent entrants into the broader FB50 list.
